name: 3M™ Adhesive Laminates Label Materials FF014008, Frosty Clear, Polypropylene Liner, 54 in Roll, Config
short_description: 3M™ Adhesive Laminates Label Materials give you dependable graphic attachment with offerings that can stand up to the demands of hot and cold environments, as well as chemicals and UV exposure. The adhesives are optimized for fast, accurate, long-term bonding applications.
benefits: Dependable attachment to low surface energy (LSE) and high surface energy (HSE) substrates
Adhesives are optimized for fast, accurate, long-term bonding applications
